workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.emptyDescription: A workspace is the language you are learning. All vocabulary, exercises, and study data live inside a workspace.
workspace.name: Workspace name
workspace.namePlaceholder: Optional — we will generate one for you
workspace.languageHint: One workspace per language. You cannot create duplicates.
workspace.languageExists: A workspace for this language already exists.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.formDescription: Add a word with meanings, examples, and tags. Drag to reorder.
vocabulary.emptyDescription: Start building vocabulary in your active workspace.
vocabulary.disabledNoWorkspace: Create a workspace before adding vocabulary.
vocabulary.deleteConfirmDescription: "{word}" will be permanently removed from your vocabulary.
vocabulary.wordExists: This word already exists in your vocabulary.

exercises.title: Exercise
exercises.description: Choose a study mode to practice your vocabulary.
exercises.studioDescription: Practice vocabulary from your active workspace with six study modes — all generated from your own words.
exercises.editDescription: Changes autosave after the first save.
exercises.noWorkspace: Create a workspace before starting exercises.

flashcard.label: Flashcards
flashcard.description: Flip cards to study words and meanings with spaced-repetition ratings.

writing.label: Writing
writing.description: Create rich writing prompts and practice tasks in the editor.
writing.pageDescription: Write prompts, questions, and practice tasks in the rich editor.

fill-in-blank.label: Fill in the Blank
fill-in-blank.description: Complete example sentences with the missing vocabulary word.

multiple-choice.label: Multiple Choice
multiple-choice.description: Pick the correct meaning or word — distractors come from your vocabulary.

match-pairs.label: Match Pairs
match-pairs.description: Match each word to its meaning in a Quizlet-style grid.

type-answer.label: Type the Answer
type-answer.description: Type the missing word or meaning and get instant feedback.

empty.noWordsDescription: Add words to your workspace first, then come back to practice.
empty.noMeaningsDescription: Add at least one meaning to your vocabulary words to use this exercise.
empty.noExamplesDescription: Add example sentences that include the vocabulary word to generate fill-in-the-blank questions.
empty.needMoreWordsDescription: Add at least {count} words with meanings in this workspace to use this exercise.
empty.noFiltered: No words match your filters. Try adjusting them to continue.

fillInBlank.keyboardHint: Enter to check · Enter again for next

multipleChoice.questionWord: What is the meaning of this word?

matchPairs.hint: Select a word, then tap its meaning

typeAnswer.incorrect: Not quite — see the correct answer above
typeAnswer.keyboardHint: Enter to check · Enter again for next

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.description: Study vocabulary with smooth flip cards, keyboard shortcuts, and spaced-repetition ratings.
flashcards.noWorkspace: Create a workspace before starting a flashcard session.
flashcards.emptyDescription: Add words to your workspace first, then come back to study with flashcards.
flashcards.noFilteredCards: No cards match your filters. Try adjusting them to continue.
flashcards.tapToFlip: Tap or press Space to flip
flashcards.ratePrompt: How well did you know this?

dashboard.description: Store vocabulary and practice {language} with exercises built from your words.
dashboard.vocabularyCardDescription: Add words with meanings, examples, and tags.
dashboard.exercisesCardDescription: Practice with flashcards, quizzes, and more — all generated from your vocabulary.

settings.title: Settings
settings.workspaceDescription: Manage settings for your active workspace.
settings.customTagsDescription: Create workspace-specific tags for vocabulary. Built-in tags are always available.
settings.tagExists: A tag with this name already exists
settings.deleteTagConfirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from all words.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your Notoria account
auth.registerDescription: Start learning with your own private workspace
auth.name: Name
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
auth.registerFailed: Could not create account. Please try again.
auth.accountDescription: Update your profile photo and password.
auth.avatarDescription: Upload a photo for your account. JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF up to 5 MB.
auth.avatarInvalidType: Please choose a JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF image
auth.avatarTooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller
auth.avatarNotConfigured: Image upload is not configured yet
auth.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
